case_title: BRICE ROBERT GLENN VS. JOHN BRINK STENDERUP

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GLENN, BRICE ROBERT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STENDERUP, JOHN BRINK $4,869.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,869.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,869.00 FILED BY GLENN, BRICE ROBERT AS TO DEFENDANT STENDERUP, JOHN BRINK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-20-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00<WAIVED>); [REMARKS: RESPONDENT CAME TO THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE AT CITY HALL, ROOM 456 AND WAS SERVED THE DOCUMENTS] SERVED NOV-29-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT STENDERUP, JOHN BRINK

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-20-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-20-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF BRICE ROBERT GLENN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOHN BRINK STENDERUP IS PRESENT. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF GLENN, BRICE ROBERT ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
